mapper.sql: select id, user_id, product_id, product_code, product_title, product_sub_title, product_image, sku_text, unit_price, quantity, is_checked, item_amount, status, invalid_reason, create_time, update_time from shopping_cart
mapper.select: where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' and is_checked = '1' order by id asc for update
mapper.update: update shopping_cart set is_checked = #{isChecked}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0'
mapper.delete: delete from shopping_cart where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' and is_checked = '1'
mapper.update: update shopping_cart set status = '2', update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' and is_checked = '1'
mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(quantity), 0) from shopping_cart where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0'
select ifnull(sum(item_amount), 0) from shopping_cart where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' and is_checked = '1'
